metadata.description: UI/UX design intelligence skill with 84 styles, 192 palettes, 74 font pairings, 25 charts, and 22 stack guidelines

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX design intelligence for AI coding assistants. Includes searchable databases of styles, colors, typography, charts, and UX guidelines for React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, and Three.js.
